case_title: KELLY N BURNS ET AL VS. DENNIS J BREEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF KELLY N BURNS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW PRICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNIS J BREEN AS TRUSTEE OF THE DENNIS J BREEN 1996 LIVING TRUST IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MARK DERBIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED SEP-03-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BREEN, DENNIS J AS TRUSTEE OF THE DENNIS J BREEN 1996 LIVING TRUST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURNS, KELLY N PRICE, MATTHEW S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREEN, DENNIS J AS TRUSTEE OF THE DENNIS J BREEN 1996 LIVING TRUST $4,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,425.00, PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $4350. LANDLORD IS RESPONSIBLE TO REMOVE MOLD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,033.91 FILED BY BURNS, KELLY N PRICE, MATTHEW S AS TO DEFENDANT BREEN, DENNIS J AS TRUSTEE OF THE DENNIS J BREEN 1996 LIVING TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
